basic_details.job_title: BTSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Technician, Assistant Bacteriologist Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bihar Technical Service Commission (BTSC) has released short recruitment notifications for Technician (Bench Chemist) and Assistant Bacteriologist posts in 2026. The recruitment drive is being conducted under the Health Department, Bihar for Technical Staff Cadre posts.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 24-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 23-08-2026

how_to_apply: Visit the official website of Bihar Technical Service Commission.
Click on the online application link.
Pay the application fee if applicable.
Submit the application form and keep a printout for future reference.

rows.bihar_technical_service_commission_btsc: Technician (Bench Chemist) - 10 Posts Assistant Bacteriologist - 3 Posts

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 24-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 23-08-2026

content_sections.heading: BTSC Technician & Assistant Bacteriologist Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: BTSC has released vacancies for Technician (Bench Chemist) and Assistant Bacteriologist posts under the Health Department, Bihar. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for BTSC Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates who fulfil the required educational qualification and eligibility conditions mentioned in the detailed BTSC notification can apply for these posts. Technician (Bench Chemist): Eligibility details will be available in the detailed notification. Assistant Bacteriologist: Eligibility details will be available in the detailed notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BTSC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website of Bihar Technical Service Commission. Open the recruitment section. Read the detailed notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete registration using your details. Fill the application form correctly. Upload required documents. Pay the application fee if applicable. Submit the application form and keep a printout for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced under BTSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 13 vacancies have been announced for Technician (Bench Chemist) and Assistant Bacteriologist posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application date for BTSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process will start on 24 July 2026 and will continue till 23 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are available in BTSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts are Technician (Bench Chemist) and Assistant Bacteriologist.
